text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I need you! The student council is holding
a ballroom dance lesson, and I'd like you to come
with me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You need a partner to join, but I could never be
so bold as to ask another Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Besides, what I want to see is the other
Umamusume dancing together! Not me pairing up
with them!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I won't be as nervous if you're my partner. There's
no one else I can ask! Please! Pleeeaaase!
